drills.name: Circle tracking quarter-cuts
drills.description: Cut the circle in four controlled quadrants while maintaining traction to build confidence with actual cutting motion.
drills.targets_weakness: No actual cutting performance was completed during this session.

drills.name: Edge-entry rehearsal
drills.description: Practice 15 starts from the gauze edge to a marked line without overshoot to establish consistent cutting initiation.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to transition from instruction to hands-on practice.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, you need to move beyond theoretical understanding to consistent hands-on practice. Focus on completing actual cutting attempts to build muscle memory and timing.
